title: AI POS Platform
subtitle: AI-native conversational POS SaaS powered by MenuMatch, LineBot, and Bill Processing
summary: MenuMatch + LineBot can be positioned as an AI-native POS SaaS platform because they already handle ordering, menu intelligence, transaction orchestration, payment automation, and operational workflow in a real business environment.

items.title: Customer Ordering Workflow
items.description: Transforms customer natural-language ordering into structured transactions, pricing, and operational workflows in real time.

items.title: Conversational Cashier
items.description: LineBot acts as an AI cashier and ordering terminal through LINE OA, replacing traditional manual order-taking interfaces.

items.title: POS Transaction Engine
items.description: MenuMatch serves as the core POS engine handling menu matching, quantity parsing, validation, pricing, and structured order generation.

items.title: Payment Automation
items.description: Bill Processing extends the platform into payment verification and operational accounting through OCR and automation workflows.

items.title: SaaS-ready Architecture
items.description: Built with cloud-native APIs, database-driven processing, AI orchestration, and reusable services ready to scale across multiple stores.

items.title: Beyond Traditional POS
items.description: Combines conversational AI, recommendation, RAG retrieval, transaction generation, and operations into an AI-native commerce platform beyond a standard POS system.
